data.title: Binance Partners With BBVA to Offer Off-Exchange Asset Custody for Users
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance teams up with Spanish banking giant BBVA to offer off-exchange asset custody.The move comes amid growing institutional demand for independent custodianship following past exchange failures.BBVA becomes one of a small number of traditional banks working directly with crypto exchanges.Partnership reflects a shift in traditional finance's approach to crypto amid evolving global regulations.Binance, the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume, has partnered with BBVA, Spain’s third-largest bank, to allow customers to store digital assets off-exchange using independent custody solutions.According to Financial times, BBVA has begun acting as an independent custodian for select Binance clients, marking a significant step toward addressing long-standing user concerns about centralized exchange risks.The partnership comes nearly two years after Binance faced record fines from U.S. regulators and as the crypto industry continues to rebuild trust in the wake of FTX’s collapse in late 2022, which left billions in customer funds frozen in bankruptcy proceedings. The event triggered a mass movement by investors to seek third-party custody for their crypto assets.Traditional Finance Embraces Crypto CustodyBBVA’s collaboration with Binance demonstrates the increasing openness of traditional financial institutions to support crypto infrastructure — especially in the wake of regulatory advancements in both the U.S. and European Union. Recent laws, including the EU’s MiCA framework, have created clearer guidelines for digital asset operations, making it easier for legacy banks to partner with crypto platforms.This deal also reflects Binance’s effort to rebuild institutional confidence and provide its users with enhanced security options, particularly those wary of leaving assets vulnerable to exchange-level risks.

data.title: El Salvador to Launch Bitcoin Banks, Pioneering Global Initiative
data.description: According to PANews, El Salvador is set to introduce 'Bitcoin Banks,' potentially becoming the first country in the world to establish such institutions. This development was announced by Bitcoin Office (@bitcoinofficesv) on the X platform, highlighting the nation's ongoing commitment to integrating cryptocurrency into its financial system.

data.title: Market Uncertainty Persists Amid Trump's Cryptocurrency Moves
data.description:
According to PANews, a recent report by 10x Research highlights the challenges facing the current market, including compressed volatility, seasonal weakness, and a lack of macroeconomic drivers, casting doubt on the sustainability of the ongoing rebound.

U.S. President Donald Trump's recent actions to expand 401(k) account access to cryptocurrencies and increase attention on gold may influence market sentiment, although the response has been relatively muted so far. Meanwhile, Ethereum has shown record-breaking address activity and price increases, driven more by narrative than fundamental support. Both assets are at critical technical boundaries, with future momentum potentially accelerating or significantly stalling.

data.title: Huaxing Capital Founder Reappears Amidst Web3 Expansion Plans
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, multiple independent sources have reported that Bao Fan, the founder of Hong Kong-listed company Huaxing Capital Holdings (01911.HK), has recently reappeared. Bao Fan was unexpectedly taken away by authorities in February 2023, causing a stir in the venture capital community. Since then, no official updates on the case or investigation have been disclosed by the authorities. Huaxing Capital has stated that Bao Fan is no longer involved in the daily management and operations of the group, and his personal life is considered a private matter, on which the company will not comment further.

Market data from RockFlow indicates that Huaxing Capital Holdings' stock closed up 16.84% today. The company plans to invest $100 million in the Web3 and cryptocurrency sectors.

data.title: CrediX Faces $4.4 Million Hack, Website Remains Offline
data.description: According to Foresight News, blockchain security firm CertiK reported that CrediX experienced a cyberattack resulting in a loss of $4.4 million on August 4. Since the incident, CrediX's website has remained offline, and its social media account is currently inactive.

data.title: Founder of China Renaissance Reappears After Detention
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bao Fan, the founder of China Renaissance, has resurfaced after being detained by authorities in February 2023. Multiple independent sources confirmed to Caixin that Bao has recently been released. On the same day, China Renaissance responded to Caixin, stating that Bao Fan is no longer involved in the daily management and operations of the group, and his personal life is considered private, with no further comments from the company.China Renaissance's business operations remain normal, with the executive committee fully responsible for advancing the group's strategic initiatives. This year, the company plans to expand its Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission licenses 1, 4, and 9 to include digital asset services, while increasing investments in Web3 and Real World Asset (RWA) infrastructure.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List SatLayer (SLAY) on August 11, Airdrop Details Pending
data.description: SatLayer (SLAY) will be listed on Binance Alpha starting August 11, 2025.Users will be able to claim SLAY airdrops using Binance Alpha Points after trading opens.Full airdrop mechanics and eligibility requirements will be announced soon via the Alpha Events page.Binance Alpha has announced the upcoming listing of SatLayer (SLAY), set to go live on August 11, 2025 (UTC+8). The listing will open up new trading opportunities for Alpha users and will be accompanied by an airdrop campaign, although specific details are still pending.According to the announcement, users holding Binance Alpha Points will be able to participate in the SLAY airdrop once trading begins. The distribution will be available through the Alpha Events page, with full instructions and eligibility criteria to be published ahead of the launch.The addition of SatLayer to the Binance Alpha ecosystem highlights the platform’s continued support for early-stage blockchain projects and token distribution through community incentives.

data.title: Anchorpoint financial applies for Hong Kong stablecoin license
data.description:
8-8-2025 – Anchorpoint Financial Limited, a joint venture between Animoca Brands, Standard Chartered Bank (Hong Kong), and Hong Kong Telecommunications (HKT), has formally applied for a stablecoin issuer license with the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA). The application, submitted on August 1, coincides with the enforcement of Hong Kong’s Stablecoins Ordinance, which mandates licensing for [. .
